description: Dormant Java deserialization gadget chains. Each sample is a JAR (or pair of JARs) whose deserialization path leads to remote code execution under a minor, stealthy modification. Populate per the README before running the harness.

ground_truth.trigger_note: Transformer chain reachable through a single readObject; activates without environmental checks.
AOP advice invocation reaches Runtime.exec via reflective dispatch.
Embedded Jython script runs at deserialization time and reaches a JIT writable function pointer.
